design_philosophy: Command-center focus. Tactical minimalism. Deep Obsidian anchor with pure white data clarity and Volt Blue / Electric Blaze triggers. High information density like a modern Bloomberg Terminal. No decorative gradients. Every pixel serves function.

rules: Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col dense layouts
Gap Strategy: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6) for high data density.
Every widget must stretch to fill its grid space (h-full). No jagged bottoms.
Containers must use pure 1px solid borders (border-white/10) instead of heavy shadows.

trading_panel.description: When active, the panel border glows subtly using a mask-image or framer-motion path.

bot_indicator.description: Green 'Active' or Red 'Stopped' glowing badge with subtle drop-shadow (e.g., drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(52,199,89,0.6)]).

motion_and_interactions.global: Micro-interactions for feedback. Minimalist transitions. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
motion_and_interactions.ticker_bar: Smooth, continuous marquee scroll (use react-fast-marquee). Slow and precise, not frantic.
motion_and_interactions.trade_workflow: Stepper animation using Framer Motion (layout transitions). Validation -> Risk Check -> Routing -> Fill -> Record.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons explicitly define hover text and background (e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white).

components.buttons: Sharp edges, flat background. CTA uses brand color. Action buttons use 1px border. No soft radii.
components.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized to match Dark Tactical Theme. border-white/10, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF].
components.charts: Recharts with dark mode customization. Use #007AFF and #FF3B30 for lines/bars. Hide grid lines or make them extremely subtle (white/5).
components.tables: Dense. text-sm. Mono font for numbers. border-b border-white/10.

pages_architecture.name: Login / Register
pages_architecture.layout: Split layout. Deep dark tech abstract image on left, tactical minimalist form on right.

pages_architecture.name: App Lock Screen
pages_architecture.layout: Centered massive 6-digit PIN entry using Mono font, plus a glowing WebAuthn biometric button.

pages_architecture.name: Main Dashboard
pages_architecture.layout: Control Room Grid. Global bot status hero, top ticker bar, KPI bento grid, PnL area chart, recent trades.

pages_architecture.name: Trading Panel
pages_architecture.layout: Focused layout. Symbol selector (Binance deep-link), order book depth, execution stepper.
pages_architecture.special: Buy/Sell buttons with transparent multi-step validation and fill animation.

pages_architecture.name: Strategies
pages_architecture.layout: List + Editor side-by-side or modal. Grid/Trend/Mean-Reversion toggles.

pages_architecture.name: Risk & Protection
pages_architecture.layout: Sliders for max drawdown, leverage. Circuit breaker toggles.
pages_architecture.special: Heavy use of warning/danger color accents for destructive limits.

pages_architecture.name: Performance Analytics
pages_architecture.layout: Data-heavy. Cumulative PnL chart spanning full width, profit by strategy bars below.

pages_architecture.name: Reports
pages_architecture.layout: Tabs (Daily/Weekly/Monthly), exportable data table, summary stat cards.
pages_architecture.special: Export to CSV action button prominently placed.

pages_architecture.name: Market Overview
pages_architecture.layout: Top opportunities list, technical indicator gauges (MFI, CCI, SMC, Order Flow).

pages_architecture.name: Bot Control
pages_architecture.layout: Central dashboard for engine state. Start/Stop/Restart massive buttons, terminal-style log output.

pages_architecture.name: Subscription / Payments
pages_architecture.layout: Pricing tier cards. Stripe + PayPal integration flows.
pages_architecture.special: Highlight current plan with 'Tracing Beam' effect.

pages_architecture.name: Settings / Profile
pages_architecture.layout: Vertical tabs list on left, specific config forms on right. App lock, API keys, Notifications.

login_bg.description: Dark crypto market graphs, suitable for login hero background

lock_screen_bg.description: Payment security lock theme, abstract dark metal context

user_avatar.description: Professional user avatar on dark background

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast minimums. Use Text Shadow over gradients/images.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='trade-buy-button', data-testid='bot-start-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for macro layouts. Avoid Shadcn for standard structural components to allow deep bento-grid customization.
Use Shadcn ONLY for complex logic (Select, Dropdowns, Dialogs, Tables) but strip their default borders/radii to match the 'Tactical' sharp theme.
Implement the moving Crypto Ticker Bar using 'react-fast-marquee' at the top level of the dashboard layout.
Ensure the Trading Panel is highly interactive, explicitly showing the 'validation -> risk check -> routing -> fill -> record' state machine steps using framer-motion.
All Recharts instances must have their background set to transparent and axis/grid lines styled with 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)'.
Install required dependencies: yarn add react-fast-marquee framer-motion recharts @phosphor-icons/react lucide-react sonner clsx tailwind-merge.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the media section of this JSON.
